jp.title: 天文学史上初めて「太陽系外衛星」を発見！ ただし質量は木星に匹敵
jp.description: 地球から約73光年離れた褐色矮星「CD-35 2722 B」の周囲で、太陽系外衛星とみられる天体が検出されました。最低質量は木星の約0.9倍で、公転周期は約171日です。史上初となる可能性がある発見の詳細と、この天体を「衛星」と分類できるのかをめぐる議論について詳しく紹介します

jp.title: 米ドル/円は165円程度まで放置されるか？片山財務相の発言から円安への懸念は伝わってこない！クロス円での円売りと高金利通貨スワップ金利稼ぎ戦略を継続！(ザイＦＸ！)
jp.description: 今週（7月20日～）、米ドル/円がここまでの高値を上に抜けて、「1ドル=163円台」となっている。これを受けて日本政府がどういう危機感を発信するのかと注目してみていたが、片山財務大臣は現在のマーケットの動きには特に言及せず「必要とあれば、いつでも断固たる措置をとる」とこれまで通りの言い方を続けている。この発言からは円安に対しての懸念はまったく伝わってこない。おそらく165円程度までは放置されるのではないか。...

jp.title: FRUITS ZIPPER鎮西寿々歌、メンバーからのサプライズに号泣 主演映画公開をお祝い＆ねぎらい
jp.description: ニュース｜　アイドルグループ・FRUITS ZIPPERの鎮西寿々歌が23日、都内で行われた映画『だぁれかさんとアソぼ？』公開前夜祭に登場。FRUITS ZIPPERメンバーからのサプライズメッセージに鎮西が感涙した。　本作は、『呪怨』シリーズなどで知られる清水崇監督の最新作。学校の、誰もいない階段。その13段目。カセットテープに日付と名前を吹き込むと、名前を吹き込まれた人は死ぬ。若者の間でひそかに広がる“絶対にやってはいけない遊び”をきっかけに、心理カウンセラーの平瀬小春（鎮西）と妹・菜々美が恐怖の連鎖に巻き込まれていく学園ホラーとなる。　初の主演映画があす公開を控え、「こうして誰一人呪われることなく公開できるというのがすごくうれしいですし、私にとって本当に特別な日を皆さんと一緒に過ごすことができてとってもうれしいです。今日はいい1日になればと思います！」と笑顔を浮かべた。　イベントでは、本作とのコラボソング「センセーション」を担当するFRUITS ZIPPERメンバーから、鎮西へのサプライズメッセージ映像が到着。6人それぞれから鎮西への約5分にわたる、ねぎらいと祝福の言葉に鎮西は一人目から涙があふれた。

world.title: Turkey: Center for Hamas Leadership and Coordination
world.description: Since 2003, the ties between Hamas and Erdoğan's Turkey have grown stronger and have been manifested by Turkey's hosting senior movement figures, political and diplomatic support and economic and humanitarian assistance; Hamas also turned Turkey into an important foothold from which it directs attacks on Israeli targets and raises funds to finance terrorist activities; During the last several months, the Hamas leadership had begun transferring its organizational activity from Qatar to Turkey for "security" reasons and due to the consequences of the war in Iran; Coordination between the Hamas and the Turkish leaderships increased regarding the continued implementation of the agreement, despite Turkey's status as guarantors of the agreement and mediators.

source.name: The Amit Terrorism and Intelligence Research Institute

world.title: National Dialogue Progressing Well: Chief Commissioner
world.description:
Addis Ababa, July 23, 2026 (ENA) — The ongoing Ethiopian National Dialogue Conference is progressing well, Ethiopian National Dialogue Commission Chief Commissioner Mesfin Araya said.
Briefing the press today, the Chief Commissioner stated that the dialogue at the conference is advancing as scheduled.
During the consultation sessions held over the past few days, delegates have been organized into working groups and generating and consolidating ideas.
Commissioner Mesfin explained that since the conference convened on July 15, 2026, participants have been working in sub-groups of 50 and smaller units of 10 to execute the initial idea generation and synthesis phase.
Assembling in teams of 10 helped build strong interpersonal rapport among participants, allowing them to acquaint themselves with one another and engage in thorough, articulated discussions about their designated agendas.
He added that experts have delivered detailed briefings and context across various thematic areas to delegates organized in eight working groups today.
Scholars and experts with extensive expertise in nation-building, history, federalism, and identity delivered keynote presentations to provide crucial input for the delegates, while also addressing questions raised by participants.
Starting tomorrow, the next phase of deliberations will commence, with reports compiled by the 10-member sub-groups being presented to their respective 50-member groups.
Highlighting that organizing 4,000 delegates at the national conference demands extensive operational preparation, Professor Mesfin commended health, security, and transportation institutions for their coordinated support.
Previous session proceedings were structured within eight primary divisions, each comprising 500 delegates.
He elaborated that starting tomorrow, the 50-member groups will submit their compiled synthesis to transition into the next stage, which involves fifty groups of 250 members each.
Next week, all 4,000 participants will continue the dialogue, deployed across 16 designated venues.
